title: PhysicalAsset

specVersion.description: Semantic version of the SourceOS spec this record conforms to.

assetKind.description: Physical storage category of this asset.

connectorId.description: URN of the Connector used to reach this asset.

location.description: Fully qualified path, URL, table name, or topic name within the connector's system.

identification.description: Cloud-provider identification details: vendor, account, region, and resourceId.

description: A reference to a physical storage location (object-store bucket, database table, Kafka topic, file path, or API endpoint), connected via a named Connector and representing the actual underlying data container for a Dataset.
